description: Semantic recall quality fixtures for embedding benchmark tests. Each fixture defines seed events and queries with expected results. Queries use single keywords or phrases that appear in event title/detail for keyword-fallback compatibility.

events.title: SQL injection detected in user login endpoint
events.detail: Parameterized query bypass found in /api/auth/login via crafted username field. WAF rule added.

events.title: API key rotation policy implemented
events.detail: All service API keys now rotate every 90 days. Secrets manager integration deployed.

events.title: Database migration rollback strategy
events.detail: Always create a checkpoint before running schema migrations. Use reversible migrations only.

queries.expected_title: SQL injection detected in user login endpoint
queries.description: Should find the SQL injection incident as top result
Should find the key rotation decision
Should find the migration rollback pattern

events.title: Context window overflow caused truncated response
events.detail: Session exceeded 180k tokens, causing critical context loss. Conversation should have been refreshed at 60% threshold.

events.title: Task decomposition reduces error rate
events.detail: Breaking tasks into subtasks of 3-5 files each reduced agent errors by 40%. Prefer small bets over monolithic changes.

events.title: Switched to hierarchical swarm topology
events.detail: Mesh topology caused message storms with 10+ agents. Hierarchical with max 8 agents and raft consensus is more stable.

queries.expected_title: Context window overflow caused truncated response
queries.description: Should find the context overflow incident

events.title: Always run tests before committing
events.detail: Standing order: npm test must pass before any git commit. Pre-commit hook enforces this.

events.title: Committed without running linter
events.detail: Agent bypassed lint check using --no-verify flag. Standing order violation detected and logged.

events.title: Session handoff: auth refactor phase 2
events.detail: Completed JWT middleware. Next session should implement refresh token rotation and update integration tests.

events.title: Auto-checkpoint before risky operations
events.detail: Creating automatic save points before file deletions, config changes, and dependency upgrades reduces recovery time.

queries.description: Should find the testing standing order
